tagline: We Partner With Management To Build A Stronger, More Valuable Business
hero_subtitle: A middle-market private equity firm focused on US-based businesses in Branded Consumer Products and Specialty Distribution and Logistics. Typical investment sizes range from $15 to $50 million.
service_area_description: Investing in middle-market companies headquartered across the United States.
services_subtitle: We invest in two core sectors — Branded Consumer Products and Specialty Distribution and Logistics — partnering with management teams to build market-leading businesses.
reviews_subtitle: Fenway Partners has invested in some of the most recognized brands in middle-market America.
cta_subtitle: We work with management teams in Branded Consumer Products and Specialty Distribution. Reach out to start the conversation.
footer_description: Middle-market private equity firm founded in New York in 1994. Focused on Branded Consumer Products and Specialty Distribution and Logistics.

services_featured.name: Branded Consumer Products
services_featured.description: We invest in companies with strong national or regional brand equity — businesses with loyal customers, defensible positioning, and room to grow.

services_secondary.name: Specialty Distribution
services_secondary.description: We back logistics and distribution businesses with differentiated service models and scalable infrastructure — built for the modern supply chain.

services_accent.name: Investment Size: $15M-$50M
services_accent.description: We write equity checks between $15 million and $50 million. We move decisively, close efficiently, and bring long-term commitment to every partnership.

services_wide.name: Strategic Add-On Acquisitions
services_wide.description: We actively support our portfolio companies in identifying and executing bolt-on acquisitions to accelerate growth and expand market reach.

about_features.title: Peter Lamm — Co-Founder & Managing Partner
about_features.description: 40 years in private equity. BA from Boston University, MBA from Columbia. Chairman of the Board, U.S. Fund for UNICEF since 2005.

about_features.title: Gregg Smart — Managing Director
about_features.description: Joined Fenway in 1999. Former investment banker at Merrill Lynch. BA in Economics from Davidson College, MBA from The Wharton School.

about_features.title: Walter Wiacek — VP & CFO
about_features.description: Joined Fenway in 2007. Responsible for all accounting, financial, investor, and tax reporting. CPA member, Bryant University alumnus.

reviews.name: Riddell / BRG Sports
reviews.text: The #1 national brand in football helmets. Fenway partnered with BRG Sports to build on a foundation of safety, technological innovation, and unparalleled customer service.

reviews.name: 1-800-Contacts
reviews.text: The undisputed national leader in direct-to-consumer delivery of prescription contact lenses. Fenway helped 1-800-Contacts scale its operational model and expand nationally.

reviews.name: Preferred Freezer Services
reviews.text: A market leader in frozen food storage with state-of-the-art, port-centric facilities. Fenway supported Preferred Freezer through a period of significant network expansion.
